vocab.meaning: cao hơn một bậc (về chất lượng, đẳng cấp)
vocab.example: Wearing a high-end timepiece definitely makes an outfit look a notch above the usual casual style.

vocab.meaning: chạy đua với thời gian (làm việc khẩn trương)
vocab.example: I'm often working against the clock to meet deadlines, so having a watch on my wrist is absolutely essential.

vocab.meaning: trông rất sang trọng, lôi cuốn và đắt tiền
vocab.example: Even with a simple suit, adding a classic watch can make you look a million dollars.

vocab.meaning: quên mất thời gian, không để ý giờ giấc
vocab.example: I tend to lose track of time when I’m engrossed in a book, which is why I need a watch to remind me of my appointments.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian (vẫn bền, tốt hoặc hợp mốt)
vocab.example: I prefer mechanical watches because they are built to stand the test of time, unlike modern gadgets that become obsolete quickly.
